frame_eqs_str: a['dec_m']=pow(0.8, div(30,a['fps'])); a['dec_s']=pow(0.9, div(30,a['fps'])); a['beat']=Math.max(Math.max(a['bass'], a['mid']), a['treb']); a['avg']=((a['avg']*a['dec_s'])+(a['beat']*(1-a['dec_s']))); a['is_beat']=(above(a['beat'], ((0.2+a['avg'])+a['peak']))*above(a['time'], (a['t0']+0.2))); a['t0']=((a['is_beat']*a['time'])+((1-a['is_beat'])*a['t0'])); a['peak']=((a['is_beat']*a['beat'])+(((1-a['is_beat'])*a['peak'])*a['dec_m'])); a['index']=mod((a['index']+a['is_beat']),16); a['q20']=a['avg']; a['q21']=a['beat']; a['q22']=a['peak']; a['q23']=a['index']; a['q24']=a['is_beat']; a['q26']=((a['bass']+a['mid'])+a['treb']); a['k1']=(a['is_beat']*equal(a['index'], 0)); a['p1']=((a['p1']*a['dec_m'])+((1-a['dec_m'])*Math.cos(div(a['time'],3)))); a['p2']=((a['p2']*a['dec_m'])+((1-a['dec_m'])*a['p1'])); a['p3']=((a['p3']*a['dec_m'])+((1-a['dec_m'])*a['p2'])); a['rott']=((a['rott']*a['dec_s'])+((1-a['dec_s'])*a['p3'])); a['zoom']=(1+((0.25*a['q20'])*a['puls'])); a['rot']=(div(a['rott'],128)*(a['normal']+div(a['index'],4))); a['cx']=(0.5+(0.5*Math.sin(div(a['time'],9)))); a['cy']=(0.5+(0.5*Math.sin(div(a['time'],7)))); a['q1']=Math.cos(a['rott']); a['q2']=Math.sin(a['rott']); a['q3']=-a['q2']; a['q4']=a['q1']; a['normal']=(1-(above(a['index'], 7)*above(a['q20'], 1.8))); a['monitor']=a['normal'];
